base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of yoshi — a character (playable) from 1990 super mario world. Yoshi — green + red + blue + yellow (palette-variants) × idle/run/flutter-jump/tongue-grab/swallow/spit-shell/spit-fire. 235×200. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
